title: cute sun
description:
A simple and adorable resource pack that replaces the Minecraft sun with a smiling, happy face!

Perfect for adding some warmth, positivity, and wholesome vibes to your world.
It’s like the sun is cheering you on every time you look up ☀️
body:
A simple and adorable resource pack that replaces the Minecraft sun with a smiling, happy face!

Perfect for adding some warmth, positivity, and wholesome vibes to your world.
It’s like the sun is cheering you on every time you look up ☀️
